Task_level_Parallelism.Control_driven.Ch.name: build
Task_level_Parallelism.Control_driven.Ch.source_code:
build: diamond.$(TARGET).xclbin host

diamond.$(TARGET).xo: ../using_fifos/diamond.cpp

Task_level_Parallelism.Control_driven.Ch.name: host
Task_level_Parallelism.Control_driven.Ch.source_code:
host: ./diamond_host.cpp
	mkdir -p build/
	g++ -D__USE_XOPEN2K8 -D__USE_XOPEN2K8 \
		-I$(XILINX_XRT)/include/ \
		-I. \
		-O3 -Wall -fmessage-length=0 -std=c++1y\
		./diamond_host.cpp \
		-L$(XILINX_XRT)/lib/ \
		-lxrt_coreutil -lpthread \
		-o ./host

xclbin: diamond.xclbin

xclbin: diamond.xclbin

xo: diamond.xo

run: build

clean

cleanall: clean
